message:
chore(beads): close frankenpandas-fd90.12 Series Arrow interop coverage

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

@@ -441,7 +441,7 @@
 {"id":"frankenpandas-fd90.1","title":"fp-io read_sql_query chunksize alias","description":"Child slice of frankenpandas-fd90: add read_sql_query chunk helpers that mirror pandas read_sql_query(..., chunksize=...) by delegating to the existing SQL chunk iterator path. Include options support, umbrella re-exports, and focused fp-io tests for batching/options/zero chunksize.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"cod-pandas","created_at":"2026-04-25T07:40:28.873856286Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-04-25T07:45:27.930495933Z","closed_at":"2026-04-25T07:45:27.928679878Z","close_reason":"Completed in 805b307","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["io","parity","sql"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"frankenpandas-fd90.1","depends_on_id":"frankenpandas-fd90","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-04-25T07:40:28.873856286Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"frankenpandas-fd90.10","title":"test(readme): cover SqlInspector remaining methods (table_comment, exists, version, has_column, column, reflect_all_*, inspect)","description":"Sister to fd90.9 / fd90.290 — covers the remaining ~10 SqlInspector / inspect entry points still uncovered by integration tests:

- table_comment(table, schema)
- table_exists(table, schema)
- server_version()
- max_identifier_length()
- dialect_name()
- has_column(table, col, schema)
- column(table, col, schema)
- reflect_all_tables(schema)
- reflect_all_views(schema)
- inspect(conn) free function

These all have public-API surface and back the README's introspection claim. Extend readme_quick_start_round_trip_through_sqlite (now uses parent/child schema from fd90.9) to call each and assert results.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-04-27T11:33:20.779907659Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-04-27T11:35:49.545692768Z","closed_at":"2026-04-27T11:35:49.543700254Z","close_reason":"completed: 10 remaining SqlInspector methods covered; promoted inspect() to prelude (commit c92ad26)","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"frankenpandas-fd90.10","depends_on_id":"frankenpandas-fd90","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-04-27T11:33:20.779907659Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"frankenpandas-fd90.11","title":"test(readme): cover module-level SQL helpers (list_sql_*, sql_*) + promote to prelude","description":"Sister to fd90.9/fd90.10. The 11 module-level free-function SQL helpers — paired with SqlInspector methods — are exposed at the crate root but absent from the prelude:

- list_sql_foreign_keys
- list_sql_indexes
- list_sql_schemas
- list_sql_tables
- list_sql_unique_constraints
- list_sql_views
- sql_max_identifier_length
- sql_primary_key_columns
- sql_server_version
- sql_table_comment
- sql_table_schema

Each pairs 1:1 with a SqlInspector method (which IS in the prelude). README line 148 documents the same introspection surface. inspect() had the same defect (fixed in fd90.10) — these are the rest of that surface.

Plan:
- Add module-level coverage to readme_quick_start_round_trip_through_sqlite (call each helper against the parent/child schema and verify against the SqlInspector results from fd90.9/fd90.10)
- Promote the 11 helpers to the prelude (pairs with SqlInspector being there)","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-04-27T11:37:15.990474738Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-04-27T11:39:36.666404169Z","closed_at":"2026-04-27T11:39:36.664316304Z","close_reason":"completed: 12 module-level SQL helpers covered + promoted to prelude (commit 8a1961c)","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"frankenpandas-fd90.11","depends_on_id":"frankenpandas-fd90","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-04-27T11:37:15.990474738Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
-{"id":"frankenpandas-fd90.12","title":"test(readme): cover Series Arrow interop (series_from_arrow_array / series_to_arrow_array) + promote to prelude","description":"Sister to fd90.10 / fd90.11. The two public Series-level Arrow interop functions are exposed at the crate root (lib.rs lines 206-207) but missing from the prelude AND not exercised by any integration test:

- series_to_arrow_array(series) -> (ArrowDataType, Arc<dyn Array>)
- series_from_arrow_array(name, labels, &arr, &dtype) -> Series

README line 1580 documents Arrow interop as a public surface. fd90.264 added these — they should be in the prelude alongside other paired top-level/prelude surfaces.

Plan:
- Add round-trip integration test: build a Series, convert via series_to_arrow_array, rebuild via series_from_arrow_array, verify identity.
- Promote both functions to the prelude.","status":"in_progress","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-04-27T11:42:50.351062864Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-04-27T11:43:23.617842384Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"frankenpandas-fd90.12","depends_on_id":"frankenpandas-fd90","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-04-27T11:42:50.351062864Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
+{"id":"frankenpandas-fd90.12","title":"test(readme): cover Series Arrow interop (series_from_arrow_array / series_to_arrow_array) + promote to prelude","description":"Sister to fd90.10 / fd90.11. The two public Series-level Arrow interop functions are exposed at the crate root (lib.rs lines 206-207) but missing from the prelude AND not exercised by any integration test:

- series_to_arrow_array(series) -> (ArrowDataType, Arc<dyn Array>)
- series_from_arrow_array(name, labels, &arr, &dtype) -> Series

README line 1580 documents Arrow interop as a public surface. fd90.264 added these — they should be in the prelude alongside other paired top-level/prelude surfaces.

Plan:
- Add round-trip integration test: build a Series, convert via series_to_arrow_array, rebuild via series_from_arrow_array, verify identity.
- Promote both functions to the prelude.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-04-27T11:42:50.351062864Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-04-27T11:45:16.455002725Z","closed_at":"2026-04-27T11:45:16.452947853Z","close_reason":"completed: Series ↔ Arrow interop covered with round-trip test + promoted to prelude (commit d93fe0b)","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"frankenpandas-fd90.12","depends_on_id":"frankenpandas-fd90","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-04-27T11:42:50.351062864Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"frankenpandas-fd90.2","title":"fp-io read_sql_table chunksize helper","description":"Child slice of frankenpandas-fd90: add read_sql_table chunk helper for pandas-style read_sql_table(..., chunksize=...) on the existing SqlConnection surface. Reuse the table-name validation/escaping path, return SqlChunkIterator, expose the umbrella re-export, and add focused fp-io tests for batching and invalid chunksize/table names.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"cod-pandas","created_at":"2026-04-25T07:46:41.440828863Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-04-25T07:50:35.683429602Z","closed_at":"2026-04-25T07:50:35.681545888Z","close_reason":"Completed in 693dc14","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["io","parity","sql"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"frankenpandas-fd90.2","depends_on_id":"frankenpandas-fd90","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-04-25T07:46:41.440828863Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"frankenpandas-fd90.3","title":"fp-io read_sql_table_columns chunksize helper","description":"Child slice of frankenpandas-fd90: add read_sql_table_columns chunk helper for pandas-style read_sql_table(..., columns=[...], chunksize=...) on the existing SqlConnection surface. Reuse table/column validation and projection query construction, return SqlChunkIterator, expose the umbrella re-export, and add focused fp-io tests for projection order, zero chunksize, and invalid projection inputs.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"cod-pandas","created_at":"2026-04-25T07:51:48.478054749Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-04-25T07:58:32.073612091Z","closed_at":"2026-04-25T07:58:32.071766828Z","close_reason":"Completed in 03a4ce7","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["io","parity","sql"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"frankenpandas-fd90.3","depends_on_id":"frankenpandas-fd90","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-04-25T07:51:48.478054749Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"frankenpandas-fd90.4","title":"fp-io SQL chunks index_col helpers","description":"Child slice of frankenpandas-fd90: add chunked SQL read helpers that combine pandas-style chunksize with index_col promotion. Cover read_sql/read_sql_query/read_sql_table chunk paths by wrapping SqlChunkIterator, preserving per-chunk RangeIndex when index_col is None and promoting/removing the named column when set. Add umbrella re-exports and focused fp-io tests for query chunks, table chunks, None behavior, and missing index_col errors.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"cod-pandas","created_at":"2026-04-25T08:00:11.325655162Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-04-25T08:08:08.040272870Z","closed_at":"2026-04-25T08:08:08.038384696Z","close_reason":"Completed in 90fd549","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["io","parity","sql"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"frankenpandas-fd90.4","depends_on_id":"frankenpandas-fd90","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-04-25T08:00:11.325655162Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
